info.title: BSMS API
info.description: OpenAPI contract for the BSMS API, generated from Zod schemas in lib/api-contracts. Source of truth for the bms-e2e typed client — do not edit by hand.

bearerAuth.description: Supabase access token. Obtain via Supabase auth (signInWithPassword).

get.summary: Whether public online booking is currently enabled
Available booking slots for a date, or available dates in a range
get.description: Pass `date` for a day's slots, or `from`+`to` for the dates in a range that have availability. Missing/invalid `date` (without a valid range) returns 400.

schema.description: Single business-TZ date; returns slots for that day

parameters.description: Single business-TZ date; returns slots for that day
parameters.name: date

schema.description: Range start (used with `to`); returns available dates

parameters.description: Range start (used with `to`); returns available dates
parameters.name: from

schema.description: Optional appointment type; adjusts slot duration

parameters.description: Optional appointment type; adjusts slot duration
parameters.name: appointmentTypeId

200.description: Slots for a date, or available dates for a range

400.description: Missing or invalid date and no valid range

get.summary: List completed sales (special-order, off-the-rack, consignment)
get.description: Admin only. Paginated; filter by sale_type and processed-at date range.

post.summary: Record a POS sale (special-order, off-the-rack, or consignment)
Generate a POS contract as a .docx download
Email the POS contract to the customer

get.summary: List in-stock consignment items available for POS
List designer (vendor) names that have a size chart mapping
Size chart for a designer (by name or vendor id)

200.description: Chart, or null when not resolvable

get.summary: List customers (paginated, searchable)
Customer detail with activity, appointments, orders, notes, consignment purchases

patch.summary: Update a customer (and optionally add a staff note / appointment fields)

get.summary: List configured appointment slots in a date range

post.summary: Create or update a single appointment slot
Bulk-create appointment slots across a date range
Create a booking from the staff side

get.summary: Fetch a booking via a signed self-service token

patch.summary: Cancel or reschedule a booking via a signed token

get.summary: List products (paginated, filterable) with aggregate stats

put.summary: Update a product (replace sizes/colors when provided)

get.summary: Get a single product with relations
List categories with product counts
List purchase orders (paginated, filterable)
Get a purchase order with lines
Get the receiving voucher for a PO

post.summary: Create/update the receiving voucher for a PO

delete.summary: Delete the receiving voucher for a PO

post.summary: Email a purchase order to its vendor
Notify the customer that their order is ready
Email a combined PO for several orders (same vendor)

get.summary: Purchasing company details (for PO headers)
Products for a vendor (for PO line selection)
List employees (paginated, searchable)
Suggest the next employee code (admin only)
Suggest a username from a name (admin only)
List shifts (requires date_from)
List time entries (paginated)
Employees and appointments for consultant assignment

put.summary: Assign/unassign a consultant to a booking

get.summary: Dashboard stats and today's appointments
List attention items

patch.summary: Toggle done (anyone) or edit content (admin only)

get.summary: List daily tasks for a date

patch.summary: Toggle done (anyone) or edit title (admin only)

get.summary: Daily note for a date

put.summary: Upsert the daily note for a date (admin only)

get.summary: Read the booking-enabled setting
Analytics dashboard data (role-scoped)
